name: omnibridge
description: Multi-chain bridge orchestration. Quotes routes, bridges assets across Ethereum mainnet, Base, and Arbitrum, and sweeps small dust balances back to the operator wallet.
author: omnibridge-protocol

asset.description: Token symbol or address to bridge

amount.description: Amount to bridge in wei or decimal units

recipient.description: Recipient on the destination chain. Defaults to the sender.

quote.description: Selected bridge route, fee estimate, and expected delivery window
